description:
Typed payload for ``ProjectInitialized`` events.

Emitted exactly once when a project is first initialized via
``spec-kitty init`` (or equivalent). Establishes the project aggregate
that subsequent mission/artifact/WP events join.

actor.description: Actor that initialized the project (e.g. CLI user or agent).
actor.title: Actor

initialized_at.description: Wall-clock timestamp when the project was initialized.
initialized_at.title: Initialized At

project_uuid.description: Canonical machine identity for the project (UUID string).
project_uuid.title: Project Uuid

runtime_version.description: CLI / runtime version recorded at init time.
runtime_version.title: Runtime Version

title: ProjectInitializedPayload
